faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Got questions? We've got answers. Find everything you need to know about using our platform, plans, and features.

industries.question: Do you have GDPR complience?
industries.answer: Yes. Clinical Data Studio fully supports GDPR requirements for personal data protection. Our platform automatically detects and anonymizes PII according to GDPR standards, ensuring your organization meets EU data protection obligations while maintaining full data utility for analysis and research.

customSolutions.question: Do you have HIPPA complience?
customSolutions.answer: Yes. We provide full HIPAA compliance support with two de-identification methods: Safe Harbor (removing all 18 PHI identifiers) and Expert Determination (statistical risk-based approach with justification). Both methods produce audit-ready compliance reports accepted by healthcare regulatory bodies.

support.question: Can I export the anonymized or synthetic data after processing?
support.answer: Yes. After processing, you can download your anonymized or synthetic data in PDF format. A compliance report with full audit trail is also available for download directly from the results screen.

implementation.question: What are the pricing plans?
implementation.answer: We offer a free trial so you can explore the platform before purchasing. For enterprise pricing and volume-based plans, reach out to our team and we'll find the best option for your organization.

settings.title: Configure De-Identification

detection.title: Detection sensitivity
detection.subtitle: Controls how carefully the system detects sensitive data.
detection.recommendedNote: Balanced is recommended for most documents.

conservative.title: Conservative
conservative.info: Detects only obvious identifiers. Best for structured data.

balanced.title: Balanced
balanced.info: Detects most sensitive entities while keeping false positives manageable.

aggressive.title: Aggressive
aggressive.info: Catches potentially sensitive data — may include false positives

hash.title: Hash — Encrypt irreversibly
hash.description: Converts to irreversible hash, preserves uniqueness

identifiers.title: All 18 HIPAA identifiers will be removed
identifiers.description: This includes names, dates, contact details, account numbers, medical identifiers, biometric data, and other HIPAA-defined identifiers.

identifiers.fixedSubtitle: All identifiers are fixed in Safe Harbor mode
